_comment: Ancient Thunder Realm (古雷界 / Gu Lei Jie) dimension — the source of thunder-attribute spiritual energy in Renegade Immortal canon. Accessed via a specific teleportation restriction/spell. Wang Lin enters it to cultivate his thunder essence and Ji Realm (a thunder-based killing technique). Three sub-regions mapped via multi_noise on the temperature/continent axes: thunderstorm_sea (hot, vast ocean of crackling thunder clouds where lightning beasts roam — temperature 0.8-1.0, continents -1.0-0.0), scorched_glass_plains (hot/arid, lightning-blasted obsidian flats where Wang Lin cultivated Ji Realm — temperature 0.6-1.0, continents 0.0-0.7), thunder_beast_peak (cooler mountainous region where thunder-attribute beasts nest, guarding thunder-essence herbs — temperature -0.3-0.3, continents 0.3-1.0). Uses minecraft:nether noise settings for chaotic vertical terrain (matching the Ancient God Land template — pocket dimensions have chaotic, non-surface terrain). Prime Directive: the Ancient Thunder Realm exists objectively as a thunder-saturated pocket dimension; its perpetual storms, lightning beasts, and scorched glass are real regardless of who perceives them.
